channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Camp Mystic Counselors Lacked Emergency Training, Investigator Finds
item.description: An investigation found that Camp Mystic's young counselors had no formal training for flood or emergency scenarios and were hesitant to take independent action during the crisis.

item.title: Supreme Court Weighs Thousands of Lawsuits Over Roundup Cancer Allegations
item.description: The Supreme Court appears divided on whether to allow a large volume of lawsuits against the maker of the herbicide Roundup over alleged failures to disclose cancer risks.

item.title: National Trust Declines DOJ Request to Drop Suit Over Trump White House Ballroom
item.description: Historic preservation advocates say they will press forward with their legal challenge to President Trump's planned $400 million White House ballroom construction project.

item.title: California Billionaire Tax Measure on Track for November Ballot
item.description: Backers of a California initiative proposing a one-time tax on billionaires report collecting sufficient signatures to qualify the measure for the November ballot.
